description: 141 - 20-03-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson and Sir Oliver Robbins (former Permanent Under-Secretary for Foreign Affairs, FCDO)

participants.name: Emails between Peter Mandelson and Sir Oliver Robbins
participants.role: former Permanent Under-Secretary for Foreign Affairs

text:
(former Permanent Under-Secretary for Foreign Affairs, FCDO)

From: Oliver Robbins/Personal

Sent: Thur 20/03/2025 6:26:53 AM (UTC)

To: Peter Mandelson Personal

Subject: Re: Headline points and actions from call

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY

Useful, thanks. Have got hold of the Ailsa readout Third Party

Oliver Robbins
FCDO

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY

From: Peter Mandelson
Sent: Thursday, March 20, 2025 3:56:18 AM
To: Oliver Robbins
Subject: Fw: Headline points and actions from call

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY
EYE

Get Outlook for iOS

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY

From: Mungo Woodifield
Sent: Wednesday, March 19, 2025 6:44:15 PM
To: Peter Mandelson
Subject: Fw: Headline points and actions from call

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY

Latest on trade/tariffs after today’s discussions.

Mungo

Mungo Woodifield
Minister Counsellor, Trade and Global Issues

425

British Embassy Washington
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY
From: 
Sent: Wednesday, March 19, 2025 6:59 PM
To: 
) ; Kate JOSEPH (DBT) ; 
 ; 
 ; 
Mungo Woodifield ; Malte Werner (Sensitive) 
Cc: 
 
Subject: Headline points and actions from call
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY
- some points to include in your actions and next steps.
Sent from Outlook for iOS
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY
 
***
JCS
JCS
JCS
JCS
JCS
Personal 
***
426
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
